title: First Hawaiian to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 24, 2026
author: Na
description: First Hawaiian, Inc. announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on April 24, 2026, before market open, followed by a conference call at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The company will provide a live webcast with slide presentation available on its website.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article is a routine earnings announcement with standard procedural information about when results will be released and how to access the conference call. There is no forward-looking guidance, performance commentary, or material business developments mentioned that would indicate positive or negative sentiment.

title: First Hawaiian Bank Board Member Says Aloha to $1 Million With Recent Insider Sales
author: Adé Hennis
description: Alan Arizumi, Vice Chair of First Hawaiian Bank, sold 43,026 shares worth approximately $1.1 million on December 4, 2025, reducing his holdings by 52.16%. This marks his first open-market sale in two years. Despite the insider selling, analysts view it as not concerning given the bank's improving financial performance with approximately 15% net income year-over-year growth expected for 2025 and its consistent dividend payout history.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: While insider selling typically raises concerns, the article explicitly states the transaction is 'not concerning.' The bank shows positive momentum with 15% YoY net income growth expected for 2025, stock up 4% in January 2026, and a consistent 3.86% dividend yield. The sale appears to be a diversification move rather than a sign of distress.

title: First Hawaiian to Report Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results on October 24, 2025
author: First Hawaiian, Inc.
description: First Hawaiian, Inc. will release its Q3 2025 financial results on October 24, 2025, before market opening, followed by a conference call at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Investors can access the call via registration and webcast.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article is a standard financial results announcement with no explicit positive or negative indicators, presenting routine corporate communication about upcoming earnings disclosure

title: How To Invest $1,000 In Regional Banks For 2025: Top Wall Street Analyst Reveals His Top Picks
author: Piero Cingari
description: JPMorgan analysts are bullish on regional banks heading into 2025, citing potential deregulation, improved M&A activity, and a favorable interest rate environment. They highlight Western Alliance, First Citizens BancShares, and Pinnacle Financial Partners as top picks.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: JPMorgan's top pick for regional banks in 2025, citing its relative strength in loan growth, cost efficiency, and positioning for upside.

title: Compared to Estimates, First Hawaiian (FHB) Q1 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: The headline numbers for First Hawaiian (FHB) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended March 2024, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.
